title: Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients 18 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Medicaid Recipients Pregnant Individuals tal Care Referrals AIDS/HIV Medicaid Recipients Older Adults Pregnant Individuals ADVANCED HEALTH COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Advanced Health is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Advanced Health Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 269-7400 Visit Website More Details ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH BROOKINGS OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in AllCare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Nurse Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 471-4106 Visit Website More Details ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH MAIN OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in AllCare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Nurse Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (844) 747-5656 Visit Website More Details ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH MEDFORD OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF AllCare CCO coordinates health insurance services for Medicaid members assigned to its Coordinated Care Organization (CCO). Includes specialized information and referrals to healthcare providers for medical, dental, and behavioral health. Additional wellness benefits for AllCare CCO members include medical transportation, pain management, weight management programs, and a 24/7 nurse help line. AllCare CCO members can receive vouchers from providers for taking healthy actions such as attending appointments and tobacco cessation, to purchase items at the BABE Store such as diapers, books, and blankets. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in AllCare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Nurse Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 734-5520 Visit Website More Details CAREOREGON COORDINATED HEALTH CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF CareOregon is a Managed Care Organization (MCO) that coordinates Medicaid services for Coordinated Care Organizations (CCO) Jackson Care Connect and Columbia Pacific. CareOregon also provides health insurance services through its partnering CCO, Health Share. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, substance use disorder treatment, and non-emergency transportation for health care visits covered by the CCO. Eligibility: For CCO services: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members in the Portland metro region currently assigned to Health Share-CareOregon CCO Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 416-4100 Visit Website More Details CASCADE HEALTH ALLIANCE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Cascade Health Alliance is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Cascade Health Alliance Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 883-2947 Visit Website More Details COLUMBIA PACIFIC CCO COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Columbia Pacific CCO is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, substance use disorder treatment, mental health care, and non-emergency medical transportation for health care visits covered by the CCO. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Columbia Pacific CCO Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 488-2822 Visit Website More Details EASTERN OREGON COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Eastern Oregon Coordinated Care Organization (EOCCO) is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Eastern Oregon Coordinated Care Organization Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (503) 765-3521 Visit Website More Details HEALTH SHARE OF OREGON COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Health Share of Oregon is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Health Share of Oregon; members are able to choose medical care through CareOregon, Kaiser Permanente, Legacy Health, OHSU, or Providence. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:45pm Email (503) 416-8090 Visit Website More Details INFORMATIONAL RECORD COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) is a local Oregon Health Plan (OHP) or (Medicaid) plan that helps OHP members use their benefits. CCOs are made up of all types of healthcare providers in a community. They work together to care for OHP members in an area or region of the state. If your caller has OHP, remember to suggest contacting their CCO to find out which providers or services are covered under their plan. Eligibility: Oregon Health Plan recipients Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details INTERCOMMUNITY HEALTH NETWORK CCO COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF InterCommunity Health Network is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in InterCommunity Health Network CCO Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 768-7863 Visit Website More Details JACKSON CARE CONNECT COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Jackson Care Connect is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, substance use disorder treatment, and non-emergency medical transportation for health care visits covered by the CCO. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Jackson Care Connect Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 500-0567 Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS OREGON HEALTH PLAN CARE COORDINATION NURSE ADVICE LINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Health Plan Care Coordination (OHPCC) Program is offered as a no-cost benefit for OHP open card members. Provides a 24-hour nurse advice service. Instructs members who are on a fee-for-service or Open Card on how to manage their care and locate providers. 500 Summer Street NE E-49 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: OHP Open Card members Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (800) 562-4620 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PACIFICSOURCE COMMUNITY SOLUTIONS PACIFICSOURCE COMMUNITY SOLUTIONS BEND COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF PacificSource Community Solutions is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Umpqua Health Alliance Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Member Services: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 229-4842 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES CENTERS FOR MEDICARE & MEDICAID SERVICES ONLINE DENTIST LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a locator tool to find local dentists that serve children. 7500 Security Boulevard Baltimore, MD 21244 Eligibility: Ages 0-19 with Medicaid coverage Hours: Not applicable (877) 543-7669 - 1-877 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS OREGON HEALTH PLAN CARE COORDINATION NURSE ADVICE LINE
